text: I feel as though I am wandering within a modern temple to creativity and inquiry. The blue glow and angled lines seem to suggest both anticipation and mystery, as if the spaces I move through are waiting to become sites of collaboration and discovery. My senses are heightened by the unusual lighting and colors. Here, I am both observer and participant in a world that promises innovation; I feel a sense of possibility, but also a subtle unease in the emptiness and the silence.
